title: Claude Code Session Schema (v2.1.144)
description: Schema for Claude Code CLI session JSONL format. Each line in a .jsonl file should validate against this schema. Covers CLI versions 2.1.97 through 2.1.144.
x-data-source: Extended from v2.1.72. Adds AttachmentMessage (25 subtypes), PermissionModeMessage, AITitleMessage, AgentSettingMessage, BridgeSessionMessage, WorktreeStateMessage, new SystemMessage subtypes (away_summary, scheduled_task_fire, informational), advisor content blocks (server_tool_use, advisor_tool_result), advisor_message iteration type, Monitor/PushNotification/ScheduleWakeup/ShareOnboardingGuide/WaitForMcpServers/RemoteTrigger tools, auto permission mode, plus origin/promptId/sessionKind/mcpMeta/agentId/slug/advisorModel/attribution* fields on user/assistant messages.

BuiltInToolName.description: Built-in tool name. Includes lowercase "bash" (observed Haiku model variant). Monitor/PushNotification/ScheduleWakeup/ShareOnboardingGuide/WaitForMcpServers/RemoteTrigger added in v2.1.97+ (Monitor in 2.1.98, PushNotification in 2.1.110, RemoteTrigger via MCP bridge).

MCPToolName.description: MCP tool name pattern: mcp__<server>__<tool>. Server names may contain colons (e.g., plugin:sentry:sentry). The trailing __<tool> segment is optional — the model occasionally emits an MCP-shaped name with only the server prefix (e.g. 'mcp__claude-in-chrome') as a hallucinated tool call.

offset.description: Line number to start reading from

type.description: File type to search (e.g., js, py)

-o.description: Print only the matched parts of each line (rg -o). Requires output_mode='content'.

TaskInput.description: Spawn a subagent or team member.

description.description: A short (3-5 word) description of the task

prompt.description: The task for the agent to perform

subagent_type.description: Type of agent to use (e.g., general-purpose, Explore, Plan)

run_in_background.description: Set to true to run this agent in the background. You will be notified when it completes.

model.description: Optional model override for this agent. Takes precedence over the agent definition's model frontmatter. If omitted, uses the agent definition's model, or inherits from the parent.

team_name.description: Team name for spawning. Uses current team context if omitted.

mode.description: Permission mode for spawned teammate (e.g., "plan" to require plan approval).

isolation.description: Isolation mode — worktree creates a temporary git worktree

markdown.description: Preview content shown when option is focused
Markdown preview content of the selected option

notes.description: Free-text notes the user added to their selection

annotations.description: Per-question annotations keyed by question text

prompt.description: Semantic description of the allowed action

allowedPrompts.description: Prompt-based permissions needed to implement the plan. These describe categories of actions rather than specific commands.

tool.description: The tool this prompt applies to

prompt.description: Semantic description of the action, e.g. "run tests", "install dependencies"

task_id.description: Task ID to get output from

ToolSearchInput.description: Fetches full schema definitions for deferred tools so they can be called.

query.description: Query to find deferred tools. Use "select:<tool_name>" for direct selection, or keywords to search.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5)

SendMessageInput.description: Inter-agent messaging. Replaces the pre-2.1.97 discriminated shape ({type, recipient, content, ...}). New shape: {to, message, summary}, where message is a string OR a typed control payload (shutdown_request, shutdown_response, plan_approval_response).

summary.description: 5-10 word UI preview (required when message is a string).

TaskCreateInput.description: Create a task in the team's shared task list.

description.description: Detailed description with context and acceptance criteria

activeForm.description: Present continuous form shown in spinner

TaskUpdateInput.description: Update an existing task's status, description, or dependencies.

addBlockedBy.description: Task IDs that block this task

TaskListInput.description: List all tasks in the team's task list.

TeamCreateInput.description: Create a new team for multi-agent coordination.

agent_type.description: Role of the calling agent in the team

TeamDeleteInput.description: Delete the current team and clean up resources.

EnterWorktreeInput.description: Enter a git worktree isolation context (new branch or existing worktree path).

name.description: Optional name for a new worktree. Mutually exclusive with `path`.

path.description: Path to an existing worktree to switch into. Mutually exclusive with `name`. Added in 2.1.105.

ListMcpResourcesInput.description: List available resources from configured MCP servers.

server.description: Optional server name to filter by

ReadMcpResourceInput.description: Read a specific resource from an MCP server.

ToolUseCaller.description: Identifies how the tool was invoked. Currently always {"type": "direct"}.

ToolUseBlock.description: Tool invocation block. New in v2.1.x: 'caller' field on every tool_use block.

ToolReferenceBlock.description: Compact reference to a tool (returned by ToolSearch). New in v2.1.x.

anyOf.description: Generic tool-result item (e.g. MCP resource descriptor with name/uri/description/mimeType/_meta/server).

DocumentBlock.description: PDF or document content block (e.g. pasted PDFs)

UsageInfo.description: Token usage and inference metadata. New in v2.1.x: inference_geo, iterations, speed.

inference_geo.description: Inference geographic region (e.g., 'not_available', empty string, or null)

model.description: Model used for this iteration (set when type=advisor_message).

iterations.description: Per-iteration usage breakdown. advisor_message entries appear when the assistant called the advisor server tool.

UserMessageContent.description: User message content - string when isCompactSummary, array otherwise

UserMessage.description: User input message. New in v2.1.97+: 'auto' permission mode, origin, promptId, sessionKind, mcpMeta, sourceToolUseID, sidechainParentUuid.

isCompactSummary.description: When true, content is summary string

isVisibleInTranscriptOnly.description: Message visible in transcript but not sent to model (v2.1.x+)

toolUseResult.description: Tool result metadata (v2.1.1+) — can be object, string, or array of content items

sourceToolAssistantUUID.description: UUID of assistant message that triggered tool (v2.1.1+)

permissionMode.description: Active permission mode for this turn. 'auto' added in v2.1.97+.

teamName.description: Team name when operating in a team context (v2.1.x+)

mcpMeta.description: MCP-server-supplied metadata attached to a tool result.

sourceToolUseID.description: Originating tool use ID (when this user message carries a tool_result).

AssistantMessage.description: Claude's response message. New in v2.1.97+: advisorModel, attributionAgent/Plugin/Skill, origin, apiErrorStatus, errorDetails, agentId, slug, sessionKind, sidechainParentUuid.

id.description: API message ID (msg_* pattern or UUID for synthetic)

isApiErrorMessage.description: Whether this is an API error message

error.description: Error payload when this assistant turn surfaced an API error.

teamName.description: Team name when operating in a team context (v2.1.x+)

advisorModel.description: Model used for advisor consultations (set when this assistant turn invoked the advisor server tool).

apiErrorStatus.description: HTTP status code (or string label) from the upstream API error.

oneOf.description: Raw error body (e.g. JSON string returned by upstream API).

errorDetails.description: Structured error details, or the raw upstream error body as a string.

SystemMessage.description: System event message. Includes bridge_status, compact_boundary with compactMetadata, turn_duration, local_command subtypes.

subtype.description: System message subtype. away_summary/scheduled_task_fire/informational added in v2.1.97+.

logicalParentUuid.description: Logical parent UUID for compact_boundary (references pre-compaction message)

teamName.description: Team name when in team context (v2.1.x+)

error.description: Error details (api_error subtype). Contains cause object mirroring the top-level cause field.

url.description: URL for bridge_status subtype (remote control session link)

cause.description: Error cause — string or object with code/path/errno (api_error retry metadata)

retryInMs.description: Retry delay in milliseconds (can be fractional)

trackedFileBackups.description: Map of file path to backup info

message.description: Full conversation message sent to subagent

WaitingForTaskData.description: Waiting for a background task to complete

ProgressData.description: Progress event data — discriminated by data.type

ProgressMessage.description: Streaming progress event. New in v2.1.x. Accounts for ~44% of all JSONL lines. Subtypes: mcp_progress, bash_progress, hook_progress, agent_progress, waiting_for_task, query_update, search_results_received.

parentToolUseID.description: Parent tool use ID (for nested tool calls)

PRLinkMessage.description: Lightweight PR link record. Emitted once when Claude creates or references a pull request. New in v2.1.x.

AgentNameMessage.description: Agent name assignment message. Sets the display name for a session/agent. Added in v2.1.68+.

CustomTitleMessage.description: Custom title message. Sets or updates the session title. Added in v2.1.68+.

LastPromptMessage.description: Last prompt message. Records the most recent user prompt for session resumption. Added in v2.1.68+.

cron.description: Standard 5-field cron expression in local time: "M H DoM Mon DoW" (e.g. "*/5 * * * *" = every 5 minutes).

prompt.description: The prompt to enqueue at each fire time.

recurring.description: true (default) = fire on every cron match until deleted or auto-expired after 7 days. false = fire once at the next match, then auto-delete.

durable.description: true = persist to .claude/scheduled_tasks.json and survive restarts. false (default) = in-memory only.

ExitWorktreeInput.description: Exit a git worktree isolation context.

action.description: "keep" leaves the worktree and branch on disk; "remove" deletes both.

discard_changes.description: Required true when action is "remove" and the worktree has uncommitted files or unmerged commits. The tool will refuse and list them otherwise.

MonitorInput.description: Start a background monitor that streams events from a long-running script.

timeout_ms.description: Kill the monitor after this deadline. Default 300000ms, max 3600000ms.

persistent.description: Run for the lifetime of the session (no timeout).

command.description: Shell command or script. Each stdout line is an event.

PushNotificationInput.description: Send a desktop notification in the user's terminal.

ScheduleWakeupInput.description: Schedule when to resume work in /loop dynamic mode.

delaySeconds.description: Seconds from now to wake up. Clamped to [60, 3600].

reason.description: One short sentence explaining the chosen delay.

prompt.description: The /loop input to fire on wake-up.

ShareOnboardingGuideInput.description: Upload the ONBOARDING.md and return a share link.

WaitForMcpServersInput.description: Wait for MCP servers that are still connecting.

servers.description: Server names to wait for (default: all pending)

ServerToolUseBlock.description: Server-side tool invocation block (e.g. advisor). Added in v2.1.x+ as Claude Code began surfacing server-managed tools alongside client tool_use blocks.

AdvisorToolResultBlock.description: Result block returned for a server_tool_use call to the advisor tool. Pairs with a ServerToolUseBlock.

tool_use_id.description: ID of the originating server_tool_use block

OriginInfo.description: Origin info for messages synthesised by Claude Code (e.g. background task notifications, channel-relayed prompts).

PermissionModeMessage.description: Permission-mode change record. Emitted when the user toggles permission mode (Shift+Tab cycle). Added in v2.1.97+.

AITitleMessage.description: AI-generated session title. Added in v2.1.97+.

AgentSettingMessage.description: Active agent setting for the session (e.g. 'claude'). Added in v2.1.97+.

BridgeSessionMessage.description: Bridge-session linkage record. Identifies a remote control / claude.ai bridge session that mirrors this local session. Added in v2.1.97+.

lastSequenceNum.description: Last sequence number synced to the bridge.

WorktreeStateMessage.description: Worktree session state record. Captures the original cwd/branch and isolated worktree path for `--worktree` / EnterWorktree sessions. Added in v2.1.97+.

AttachmentHookNonBlockingError.description: Hook failed with a non-blocking status (the turn continues).

AttachmentHookBlockingError.description: Hook returned a blocking error (turn halted with feedback to Claude).

AttachmentHookCancelled.description: Hook execution cancelled (timeout or user interrupt).

AttachmentTaskReminder.description: Reminder of the current task list state (TaskCreate/Update).

AttachmentTodoReminder.description: Reminder of the current TodoWrite list state.

AttachmentQueuedCommand.description: User prompt queued while Claude was responding.

oneOf.description: Multi-part queued prompt (e.g. text + pasted image).

commandMode.description: How the queued prompt should be delivered (e.g. 'prompt').

AttachmentDeferredToolsDelta.description: Delta to the deferred-tools list (Tool Search). Surfaces which tool schemas are currently fetchable via ToolSearch.

AttachmentMcpInstructionsDelta.description: Delta to MCP server instruction blocks injected into the system prompt.

AttachmentSkillListing.description: Listing of skills available to invoke via the Skill tool.

AttachmentInvokedSkills.description: Skills invoked in this turn (full content included).

AttachmentEditedTextFile.description: Snippet of a file the user edited externally; injected back into context.

AttachmentPlanModeExit.description: Plan-mode exit marker. Records the path to the saved plan file.

AttachmentNestedMemory.description: Nested CLAUDE.md memory file loaded from a subdirectory.

AttachmentCommandPermissions.description: Tool allowlist enforced for an invoked slash command.

AttachmentCompactFileReference.description: Compact-mode reference to a file that was previously loaded but is now elided.

AttachmentGoalStatus.description: Goal-mode status check (/goal). Emitted when Claude probes whether the user's stated goal is met.

AttachmentMessage.description: Attachment message. A user-side context-injection record that does not contribute to the LLM conversation directly but records out-of-band state (hook results, queued commands, output-style changes, file/dir attachments, etc.). Added in v2.1.97+.
